calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-21-2013 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion For Default Judgment
Off Calendar Aug-20-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.

David W. Ammons, Deputy City Attorney, appearing for Plaintiff, City and County of San Francisco by/through its Port Co.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) Highland Photograpic Laboratories.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
Court ordered Defendants Does 1-10 are ordered dismissed without prejudice.
Elsa Lam sworn and examinded on behalf of Plaintiff.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $15,313.10
Pre-Judgment Interest: $1,500.00
Attorney's Fees: Court allows Plaintiff to file a Motion for Attorney's Fees on or before September 30, 2013. Court scheduled Motion for Attorney's Fees on October 10. 2013 at 10:00 AM, in Department 514. Counsel to file Motion and serve department 514 with courtesy copies.
Costs: $725.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $17,538.10. The Judgment refers to Pier 96 only.
Judgment signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-18-2013 Continued To Sep-10-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff's counsel is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause is reset to SEP-10-2013 at 10:30 AM in Department 610. Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-28-2013 Continued To Jul-16-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-05-2012 Set For Order To Show Cause On Apr-16-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-02-2012 Continued To Dec-19-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610
